tasks.subject: Task 1: Card Framework Polish
tasks.description:
Apply Section 1 visual tweaks (border-radius, box-shadow, padding, title sizing/letter-spacing) to the paper library card.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/views/knowledge-base/index.vue` (~4 SCSS selectors)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `.paper-library-card` border-radius is 10px
- [ ] `.paper-library-card` box-shadow is `5px 5px 0 rgba(201, 193, 178, 0.42)`
- [ ] `.paper-library-card > .n-card-header` padding is `14px 20px`
- [ ] `.paper-library-card .n-card__content` padding is `16px 20px`
- [ ] `.paper-library-card .n-card-header__main` font-size is `22px` with `letter-spacing: 0.2px`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` exits 0

**Verify:** `cd frontend && pnpm typecheck` → exits 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/views/knowledge-base/index.vue"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && pnpm typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["border-radius 10px", "box-shadow softened", "header padding 14px 20px", "content padding 16px 20px", "title 22px + letter-spacing 0.2px", "pnpm typecheck passes"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Table Polish
tasks.description:
Apply Section 2 visual tweaks (cell padding, hover softness, transitions, Index Budget density, badge sizing, failed-state markup tweak).

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/views/knowledge-base/index.vue` (1 TSX inline-style swap + 5 SCSS selector edits)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `.n-data-table-th` and `.n-data-table-td` have padding 12px 12px
- [ ] `.n-data-table-td` has `transition: background-color 120ms ease`
- [ ] Row hover background is `#f1ebd9`
- [ ] `.library-index-cell` gap is 6px
- [ ] `.library-index-line__label` has letter-spacing 0.4px
- [ ] Failed-state `<NEllipsis>` uses `style="color: #8c4034"` instead of `class="text-stone-500"`
- [ ] Badge group has `min-height: 23px` and `padding: 2px 9px`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` exits 0

**Verify:** `cd frontend && pnpm typecheck` → exits 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/views/knowledge-base/index.vue"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && pnpm typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cell padding 12px", "row hover soft tint + transition", "index cell gap 6px", "index label letter-spacing", "failed-state inline color", "badge sizing updated", "pnpm typecheck passes"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Visual Verification
tasks.description:
Confirm the UI polish matches the approved design spec and that the page still renders correctly across desktop / tablet / mobile breakpoints, with explicit user sign-off.

**Files:** (none modified — verification only)

**User Verification Required:**
Before marking this task complete, you MUST call AskUserQuestion:
```yaml
AskUserQuestion:
  question: "知识库页面 UI 打磨结果如何?对照设计 spec 检查卡片与表格细节。"
  header: "Verification"
  options:
    - label: "看起来更舒服了"
      description: "保留复古风,只打磨了细节 — 符合预期,可以收尾"
    - label: "还需要调整"
      description: "某些细节没达到预期,需要再调"
```

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Dev server runs without console errors
- [ ] Card title at 22px with letter-spacing
- [ ] Card padding balanced, border-radius 10px, softer shadow
- [ ] Table rows have breathing room, soft hover, smooth transition
- [ ] Index Budget column slightly tighter
- [ ] Badges consistent at 23px min-height
- [ ] Failed-state error in rust color
- [ ] No overlap at desktop/tablet/mobile
- [ ] User confirms polish looks good

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["user visual sign-off", "all polish details visible across breakpoints"], "requiresUserVerification": true, "userVerificationPrompt": "知识库页面 UI 打磨结果如何?对照设计 spec 检查卡片与表格细节。"}
```

followUpFixes.subject: Page padding so card clears sidebar (initial fix)
followUpFixes.rationale: User verification reported the card was touching the sidebar. .paper-library-page had only 2px padding, no breathing room. Increased to padding: 16px 20px.

followUpFixes.subject: Align page padding with user page layout
followUpFixes.rationale: User asked to match the /user page layout. The user page uses just padding-bottom: 8px and relies on the global layout's 32px left padding. Reverted horizontal padding and matched the user page's padding-bottom: 8px pattern.
